name: 雪球人生 (A Snowball Life)
description: Snowball Life The destruction mechanism of snowballs has led to many people living a snowball life. Of course, some people have missed the snowball, and some have missed the snowball. However, many people still dream of living a snowball-like life. The snowball life has been born. If you want to live a snowball-like life, maybe, here is the answer! Snowball life mechanism: 3% handling fee: all destroyed to the black hole Snowball Life is a meme token launched on BNB Chain through the Flap platform. The innovative mechanism is that the transaction slippage is 3% and is directly destroyed into the black hole.
